Package edu.ncsu.csc316.trail.manager

Class TrailManager

java.lang.Object
edu.ncsu.csc316.trail.manager.TrailManager
public class TrailManager extends Object
Class that manages the trails
Author:
Diya Patel

  • Constructor Details

    • TrailManager

      public TrailManager(String pathToLandmarkFile, String pathToTrailFile) throws FileNotFoundException
      constructer for TrailManager that sets up the landmarks and trails
      Parameters:
      pathToLandmarkFile - the path to the landmark file given
      pathToTrailFile - the path to the trail file given
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if there is no file given

  • Method Details

    • getDistancesToDestinations

      public edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.Map<edu.ncsu.csc316.trail.data.Landmark,Integer> getDistancesToDestinations(String originLandmark)
      gets the distances from a originLandmark to all the other landmarks there are
      Parameters:
      originLandmark - the start landmark
      Returns:
      a map of all the landmarks that can be reached and the distance from the start

    • getLandmarkByID

      public edu.ncsu.csc316.trail.data.Landmark getLandmarkByID(String landmarkID)
      gets the landmark from the ID passed
      Parameters:
      landmarkID - the ID of the landmark to find
      Returns:
      l the landmark with the matching ID
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there is no matching ID

    • getProposedFirstAidLocations

      public edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.Map<edu.ncsu.csc316.trail.data.Landmark,edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.List<edu.ncsu.csc316.trail.data.Trail>> getProposedFirstAidLocations(int numberOfIntersectingTrails)
      gets all the interesting trails to determine the best location to put the first aid
      Parameters:
      numberOfIntersectingTrails - the number of interesting trails
      Returns:
      sortedResult the result of the map of the best way to put the first aid location
